name: envcloak
description: envcloak — read and edit .env files in Claude Code without exposing real secret values.

plugins.name: envcloak
plugins.description: Zero-dependency MCP server + PreToolUse hook that lets an agent read and edit .env files through a length-preserving, blurred view — secrets never leave the file. Blocks raw .env access via Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Glob/Bash.
